_publications._publicationTitle: Therapeutic Vulnerability to ATR Inhibition in Concurrent

_contextSnippet: Reduced growth of U251 after ATRX KO was also evident in vivo using orthotopic intracranial xenografts upon histological examination...leading to a prolonged survival
